notes:
v0.1.4 ships a hotkey you can actually customize.

• New default: Right Option (alone). Tap to start dictating, tap to stop.
• Pick your own in Settings > Hotkey: single modifier keys (Right Option, Left Option, Fn, Caps Lock) or 2-key combos (Cmd+Opt+V, etc).
• Existing Cmd+Opt+V users: automatically migrated to Right Option. You can switch back in Settings if you preferred the old combo.

Why: Spokenly users have years of single-key muscle memory. Three-key combos break that. Voquence now matches.
